creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)

> -   currently lacks a subsection for iwm(4)

I noticed that yesterday and am not sure when it was regenerated and based on which template

> - does list three types of 7260 under iwlwifi

That's what Intel calls them in the driver;  see iwlwifi.4 and iwlwififw.4 for details.
